Platforms and Software Resources

Urban Design Tools and Platforms
nodes.itemHTML: • GIMP - GIMP is an open cross-platform image editor available for GNU/Linux, macOS, Windows and more operating systems.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Platforms and Software Resources

Urban Design Tools and Platforms
nodes.itemHTML: • Adobe Creative Suite - Adobe's collection of 20+ desktop and mobile apps and services for photography, design, video, web, UX, and more. Popular products include Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, and others.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Platforms and Software Resources

Urban Design Tools and Platforms
nodes.itemHTML: • Inkscape - Inkscape is vector-based, open graphic manipulation tool often used as a counterpart to GIMP.
• Sklearn-genetic-optstars156: An AutoML package for hyperparameters tuning using evolutionary algorithms, with built-in callbacks, plotting, remote logging and more.
• Awesome Sysadminstars15.3k - Curated list of amazingly awesome open source sysadmin resources.

• Biscuit - Biscuit merge concepts from cookies, JWTs, macaroons and Open Policy Agent. “It provide a logic language based on Datalog to write authorization policies. It can store data, like JWT, or small conditions like Macaroons, but it is also able to represent more complex rules like role-based access control, delegation, hierarchies.”
• Is this what Enterprise mean? - A use-case of badly designed contract management alienating big enterprise customers. See the associated HN comments on bulk license purchase.
• EU eInvoicing - European standard on electronic invoice.

• Burnout From an Organizational Perspective - “Extensive research by the military on sustainable performance in stressful conditions teaches that leaders should become champions of health, rather than taskmasters.” Describe the symptoms of toxic organizations and how managers can protect their teams from systemic burnout.
• What makes you resilient? - A quick test to profile your energy source, the way you deal with stress, and how it impact your team.

• Socially Optimal Pricing of Cloud Computing Resources - “The socially optimal operating point is unique, and can be sustained by a linear, usage-based tariff, which charges a fixed price per unit resource and unit time.” This paper justify usage-based pricing for cloud resources.
• Swift Codes - Swift / BIC codes for personal use only.
• phaazon/hop.nvimstars1.7k - Hop is an EasyMotion-like plugin allowing you to jump anywhere in a document with as few keystrokes as possible.

• ggandor/lightspeed.nvimstars1.4k - A Sneak-like plugin offering unparalleled navigation speed via ahead-of-time displayed labels, that eliminate the pause between entering the search pattern and selecting the target.
• Godot Polygon 2D Fracturestars184 - Two simple scripts for fracturing and cutting polygons.
• Dotnet outdatedstars645 - A .NET Core global tool to display and update outdated NuGet packages in a project

• Rapid Transit Database - Collection of all rapid transit corridors worldwide, including bus rapid transit, light rail, and subway, published by the Institute for Transportation & Development Policy.

• Fusionstars1.5k - .NET Core and Blazor library that attempts to dramatically improve the way we implement real-time and high-load services by introducing a novel kind of "computed observables" - immutable, thread-safe, and most importantly, almost invisible for developers. Samples 1stars128 Samples 2stars58
• GrandNodestars596 - Headless, multi-vendor, multi-tenant, the most advanced open source e-commerce platform based on .NET Core 5.0 and MongoDB.

• FusionCachestars286 - An easy to use, high performance and robust cache with an optional distributed 2nd layer and some advanced features, like a fail-safe mechanism and advanced timeouts management
• incident.io Blog - Guides, advice and resources on incident management and response.
• NumCppstars2.6k - A templatized header only C++ implementation of the Python Numpy library. [MIT]

nodes.itemHTML: • PythonD - Python for DOS, including multi-threading, networking and OpenGL.
• 🍓 MixerApi - Streamline development of modern RESTful APIs for your teams CakePHP project.
• Denote - Converts MIDI files into SFX data-- interactive and web based.
• GNU Nanostars0 - Syntax highlighting.
• 🎨🌍🔧 Tailwind Gradient Generator - Create perfect Tailwind CSS gradients with zero lines of code.
• Web Components punch list
• Open Web Components: Codelabs
• open-wc code examples - Collection of best practices and design patterns for developing web components.
• Qui-maxstars196 - A Vue 3.x Design System for Web
• BMW Car Design - Interactive exploration of BMW design.
• rmw_iceoryxstars88 - Enables usage of the inter-process-communication middleware Eclipse iceoryx.
• v-google-translatestars105 - A component that use google translate to internationalize your Vue.js app.

• AWS Incident Response Runbook Samples - AWS IR Runbook Samples meant to be customized per each entity using them. The three samples are: "DoS or DDoS attack", "credential leakage", and "unintended access to an Amazon S3 bucket".
• Baserow - Open source no-code database and Airtable alternative.
• Potion - Create custom websitesin minutes. All on Notion.
• placeid - Generate your social share images automatically.
• Screenshot - Programmatic Screenshots of Any Website in Seconds.
• MongoDB for VS Code - Connect to MongoDB and prototype queries from VS Code
• MongoDB developer blog
• Compass - Free Cross-platform GUI from MongoDB
• mongodb-rust-driverstars1.1k - Official Rust driver
• CXXGraphstars170 - free C++(17) graph header-only library for representation and algorithms execution. [AGPL-3.0]
• gjfstars91: A tool to fix invalid GeoJSON objects
• vue-tweetstars23 - Vue 3 component that let you embed tweets in your App by only giving the tweet id
• SSD1320 - SPI - Graphical OLED display controller -
• gaiastars572 - A web application to import and run your Terraform modules.
• 🍓 Galley - A small Docker dev environment for CakePHP development which includes a simple command line utility.
• NEETS (Navy Electricity and Electronics Training Series) (alternative link)- U.S. Navy Non-Resident Training Course Material.
• Cryptorstars29: Overlay P2P network that values your privacy and anonymity above all else. Packages and some clients included.
• budgetzerostars471 - Free, self-hosted, open-source, envelope-budgeting web and desktop app. (Demo) AGPL-3.0 Nodejs
• Notes'n'Todosstars15 - Write notes and todos online in markdown with tag filtering and date sorting. (Demo) MIT Python
• jackalstars1.3k - XMPP server with focus on stability, simple configuration and low resource consumption. Apache-2.0 Go
• vue3-openlayersstars360 - Vue 3 components to work with OpenLayers.
• Eagle App - Simple and intuitive file manager with tag and annotaion for all your design files. Supports all major source, image, RAW, video, 3D, audio, font, and office files.
• Zero to Marketing. A weekly email with 5-minute case study with actionable tips.
• Mutta Puffsstars1 - Sports league scheduler that solves the Travelling Tournament Problem for a given set of teams using Population-based Simulated Annealing.
• Yagna-binaries for aarch64stars7 - Build for 64 bit arm architecture to be able to run as a provider on a system such as a Raspberry Pi.
• Code Monkey - more graphics to learn Python type of code. ( Not-free for advanced levels )
• Lightbot - Solve puzzles with commands, loops, and conditionals. Comes in Lightbot and lightbot Jr, and a mobile app or a desktop website.
• Sea_battlestars0 - A simple example of a sea battle game. Rust + Yew.

• Deepnote - A new kind of data science notebook. Jupyter-compatible with real-time collaboration and running in the cloud. Free tier includes unlimited personal projects, up to 750 hours of standard hardware and teams with up to 3 editors.
• reqres.in - A Free hosted REST-API ready to respond to your AJAX requests.
• Duckly — Talk and collaborate in real-time with your team. Pair programming with any IDE, terminal sharing, voice, video and screen sharing. Free for small teams.
• robocorp.com - Open-source stack for powering Automation Ops. Try out Cloud features and implement simple automations for free. Robot work 240 min/month, 10 Assistant runs, Storage of 100 MB.

• SoftaCheck — An online tool that performs static analysis for C/C++ code using open source tools such as cppcheck and clang-tidy and automatically generates code documentation for users using doxygen. This tool is free for use.
• reCAPTCHAMe — free reCAPTCHA and hCAPTCHA backend service. No Server-Side coding needed. Works for static websites.
• smartmockups.com — Create product mockups, 200 free mockups.
• Updrafts.app - WYSIWYG web site builder for tailwindcss based designs. Free for non-commercial usage.

• Bearer - Helps implement privacy by design via audits and continuous workflows so that organizations comply with GDPR and other regulations. Free tier is limited to smaller teams and SaaS version only.
• Miller - Like awk, sed, cut, join, and sort for name-indexed data such as CSV, TSV, and tabular JSON.
• getstream.io — Build scalable newsfeeds, activity streams, chat and messaging in a few hours instead of weeks
• TCN75A - I2C - Microchip TCN75A temperature sensor -
• Darwin Analytics - Tool for measuring and optimizing your site. Built with Vue3 and Vite.
• Oracle - A black box that magically gives answers even to undeciable questions like the halting problem.
• WAILstars289 - A graphical user interface (GUI) atop multiple web archiving tools intended to be used as an easy way for anyone to preserve and replay web pages; Python, Electronstars107. (Stable)
• Warcproxstars317 - WARC-writing MITM HTTP/S proxy. (Stable)
• EasyList - Sets of rules that automatically remove unwanted content from the internet.
• OpenRGB - Open source RGB lighting control that doesn't depend on manufacturer software.
• personalDNSfilter - A DNS filter proxy to filter unwished hosts based on a host list.
• Jetbrains / PHPStorm Silverstripe Template Language Support - Syntax highlighting for Silverstripe template files.
• @egjs/vue-flicking - It's reliable, flexible and extendable carousel for Vue.js 2 & 3.
• Effective Data Science Infrastructure
• fakermail.com — Free, temporary email for testing with last 100 email accounts stored.
• Beating Burnout: A Guide For Supporting Mental Health At Work - By Almanac Core.
• How To Prevent Or Recover From Developer Burnout - By Anastasia.

• TLA Black Women In Tech - Not-for-profit organisation dedicated to building bridges of opportunities in tech by enabling black female talents to excel and companies to have access to black women of talent.
• BookmarkOS.com - Free all-on-one bookmark manager, tab manager, and task manager in a customizable online desktop with folder collaboration.
• Ecopia - Ecopia AI leverages AI to convert high resolution images of the earth into HD Vector Maps and to digitize infrastructure assets in a geospatial format.
• Assert truestars19 - A lot of ways to you set your assert as true.
• geojson-serializerstars5: serialize Java with annotations as GeoJSON
• 📟 new-tailwind-appstars233 - Creates React.js, Next.js, Gatsby.js, Vue3, Laravel, and basic Tailwind CSS apps.
• Stats API Documentation - API endpoints that the Golem Network Stats page uses to display its data.
• 🎉 Solarus - Cross-platform 2D Action/Adventure C++ game engine with Lua API and game editor.
• Casdoorstars4.3k - A UI-first centralized authentication / Single-Sign-On (SSO) platform based. Supports OIDC and OAuth 2, social logins, user management, 2FA based on Email and SMS.
• Vortice.Vulkanstars171 - .NET Standard 2.0 and .NET5 C# bindings [MIT]
• Directus — Headless CMS. A completely free and open-source platform for managing assets and database content on-prem or in the Cloud. No limitations or paywalls.
• cdnjs.com — Simple. Fast. Reliable. Content delivery at its finest. cdnjs is a free and open-source CDN service trusted by over 11% of all websites, powered by Cloudflare.
• jsdelivr.com — A free, fast, and reliable CDN for open source. Supports npm, GitHub, WordPress, Deno, and more.
• d3-interpolate-pathstars289 - Interpolates paths with different number of points
• Ganimedestars2 - Store, version, edit and execute notebooks in sandboxes and integrate them directly via REST interfaces.
• Voilastars4.4k - Rendering of live Jupyter Notebooks with interactive widgets, allowing dashboarding based on Jupyter Notebooks.
• #lisp on Libera Chat - IRC channel for all Lisp dialects.
• #clschool on Libera Chat - IRC channel for learning Common Lisp.
• #lispcafe on Libera Chat - IRC channel for off-topic discussions.
• ipychartstars61 - Interactive Chart.js plots in Jupyter.
• #commonlisp on Libera Chat - main Common Lisp IRC channel.
• Reddit Golem Stat Botstars3 - Scrapes Reddit posts on /r/GolemProject, and replies if specific keywords/commands are found.
• Top 50 Docker Interview Questions & Answers
• From Cloud to DevOps to Serverless in under 10 minutes using maps - A basic introduction to change in the IT industry using the concept of Wardley maps by Simon Wardley (9:56).
• Aimeosstars2.9k - Leading Laravel eCommerce framework to build ultra fast online shops, marketplaces and complex B2B applications scalable from 1 to 1,000,000,000+ items
• SCIM for keycloakstars106
• Sodium (for Fabric)stars3.7k - A Fabric mod designed to improve frame rates and reduce micro-stutter.

• Data Axle - Data Axle offers some of the most comprehensive and accurate business and consumer databases, boasting almost 400 distinct attributes across businesses and consumers in the United States and Canada.
